packageRules.description: automerge:false — release-prepare.yaml owns merging this PR (it regenerates mise.lock then enables GitHub auto-merge); this avoids racing Renovate's own automerge.
Lock-file-maintenance PRs only refresh mise.lock (no mise.toml bump), so release-prepare never touches them; they are safe to automerge behind the required build check.

Coding-agent harness, ungrouped from the SHA-pinned agent CLIs: the Dockerfile verifies it via PGP against the release signature (no *_SHA256_* ARGs), so a version bump is self-contained and safe to automerge on a green build. 3-day age gate instead of the global 10: harness releases ship protocol/feature fixes weekly and staleness has real operational cost on the Hermes terminal backend.

automerge:false — cli-sha-recapture.yaml owns merging this PR (it recaptures the per-arch *_SHA256_* ARGs the version bump invalidates, pushes the fixup, then enables GitHub auto-merge), mirroring the release-prepare/mise.lock pattern. Never push manual commits to this branch outside that workflow: an edited branch freezes Renovate. The 3-day age gate matches MINIMUM_RELEASE_AGE_DAYS in the Dockerfile.

customManagers.description: Update pinned versions in shell scripts and Dockerfiles via '# renovate:' comments
